---
title: "PhillyStat360 — 04b: VPI Comparison & Spatial Analysis (R port)"
output: html_document
---

R port of `code/python/04b_vpi_comparison.ipynb`. Joins predictions to OPA
metadata, reports per-ZIP and per-building-type AUC, ward-level summaries,
and an equity audit by census-tract median household income.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libs}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(yardstick)
})

ROOT       <- here::here()
RAW_PATH   <- file.path(ROOT, "rawdata")
DATA_PATH  <- file.path(ROOT, "data")
PY_PATH    <- file.path(ROOT, "data_py")
OUT_PATH   <- PY_PATH
GRAPH_PATH <- file.path(ROOT, "graphs", "python")
dir.create(GRAPH_PATH, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

stopifnot(file.exists(file.path(PY_PATH, "all_predictions_rf.csv")))
SEED <- 42
```

## 1. Load data

```{r load}
preds <- read_csv(file.path(PY_PATH, "all_predictions_rf.csv"),
                  show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(parcel_number = as.character(parcel_number))

features_full <- read_csv(file.path(DATA_PATH, "features_residential.csv"),
                          show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(parcel_number = as.character(parcel_number))
features <- features_full |>
  select(parcel_number, zip_code, census_tract,
         exterior_condition, building_age)

opa_path <- file.path(RAW_PATH, "opa_properties_public.csv")
if (!file.exists(opa_path)) opa_path <- file.path(DATA_PATH, "opa_properties_public.csv")
opa <- read_csv(opa_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  rename_with(\(x) str_to_lower(str_replace_all(str_trim(x), " ", "_"))) |>
  mutate(parcel_number = as.character(parcel_number)) |>
  select(parcel_number, geographic_ward,
         category_code, category_code_description,
         building_code_description) |>
  distinct(parcel_number, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

## Tier mapping

```{r tier-map}
TIER_LEVELS <- c("Very Unlikely (0–0.2)", "Unlikely (0.2–0.4)",
                 "Maybe (0.4–0.6)",       "Likely (0.6–0.8)",
                 "Very Likely (0.8–1.0)")
to_tier <- function(p) {
  cut(p, breaks = c(-Inf, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, Inf),
      labels = TIER_LEVELS, right = FALSE, include.lowest = TRUE)
}

prob_col <- if ("ensemble_prob" %in% names(preds)) "ensemble_prob" else "rf_prob"
cat("Using", prob_col, "as primary probability column\n")

df <- preds |>
  left_join(features, by = "parcel_number") |>
  left_join(opa, by = "parcel_number") |>
  mutate(prob_tier = factor(to_tier(.data[[prob_col]]),
                            levels = TIER_LEVELS, ordered = TRUE))
```

## 2. Per-ZIP AUC

```{r zip-auc}
safe_auc <- function(y, p) {
  if (length(unique(y)) < 2 || length(y) < 10) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(yardstick::roc_auc_vec(factor(y, levels = c(1, 0)), p,
                                    event_level = "first"))
}

zip_auc <- df |>
  filter(!is.na(zip_code)) |>
  group_by(zip_code) |>
  filter(n() >= 50, sum(ovs == 1) >= 5) |>
  summarise(n_parcels = n(),
            n_vacant  = sum(ovs == 1),
            prev_rate = mean(ovs == 1),
            auc       = safe_auc(ovs, .data[[prob_col]]),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(auc)

cat(sprintf("ZIPs evaluated: %d | median AUC: %.3f | < 0.70: %d\n",
            nrow(zip_auc), median(zip_auc$auc, na.rm = TRUE),
            sum(zip_auc$auc < 0.70, na.rm = TRUE)))
zip_auc |> head(10)
```

```{r zip-auc-plot, fig.width=13, fig.height=5}
zip_p <- zip_auc |>
  mutate(zip_code = factor(zip_code, levels = zip_code)) |>
  ggplot(aes(zip_code, auc, fill = auc)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu", direction = 1, limits = c(0, 1)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.70, color = "tomato", linetype = "dashed") +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  labs(title = sprintf("Model AUC by ZIP code (%d ZIPs)", nrow(zip_auc)),
       x = NULL, y = "AUC") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 6))
ggsave(file.path(GRAPH_PATH, "auc_by_zip.png"), zip_p,
       width = 13, height = 5, dpi = 200)
zip_p
```

## 3. Per-building-type AUC

```{r bldg-auc}
bldg_auc <- df |>
  filter(!is.na(category_code_description)) |>
  group_by(category_code_description) |>
  filter(n() >= 100, sum(ovs == 1) >= 10) |>
  summarise(n_parcels = n(),
            n_vacant  = sum(ovs == 1),
            prev_rate = mean(ovs == 1),
            auc       = safe_auc(ovs, .data[[prob_col]]),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(n_parcels))
bldg_auc
```

## 4. Tier distribution

```{r tier-dist}
TIER_COLORS <- c(
  "Very Unlikely (0–0.2)" = "#4575b4",
  "Unlikely (0.2–0.4)"    = "#91bfdb",
  "Maybe (0.4–0.6)"       = "#ffffbf",
  "Likely (0.6–0.8)"      = "#fc8d59",
  "Very Likely (0.8–1.0)" = "#d73027"
)

tier_summary <- df |>
  group_by(prob_tier) |>
  summarise(n_parcels = n(),
            n_ovs     = sum(ovs == 1),
            ovs_rate  = mean(ovs == 1),
            mean_prob = mean(.data[[prob_col]]),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(pct = n_parcels / sum(n_parcels))
tier_summary
```

```{r tier-plot, fig.width=13, fig.height=4.5}
p1 <- ggplot(tier_summary, aes(prob_tier, n_parcels, fill = prob_tier)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = TIER_COLORS, guide = "none") +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::comma(n_parcels)), vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "N parcels") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1))

p2 <- ggplot(tier_summary, aes(prob_tier, ovs_rate, fill = prob_tier)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = TIER_COLORS, guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(ovs_rate, 0.1)),
            vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "OVS=1 rate") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1))

tp <- patchwork::wrap_plots(p1, p2, ncol = 2) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "Tier distribution")
ggsave(file.path(GRAPH_PATH, "tier_distribution.png"),
       tp, width = 13, height = 4.5, dpi = 200)
tp
```

## 5. Ward-level summary

```{r ward-summary}
high_tiers <- c("Likely (0.6–0.8)", "Very Likely (0.8–1.0)")

ward_summary <- df |>
  filter(!is.na(geographic_ward)) |>
  group_by(geographic_ward) |>
  summarise(
    n_parcels      = n(),
    n_ovs          = sum(ovs == 1),
    ovs_rate       = mean(ovs == 1),
    mean_prob      = mean(.data[[prob_col]]),
    n_very_likely  = sum(prob_tier == "Very Likely (0.8–1.0)"),
    n_high_risk    = sum(prob_tier %in% high_tiers),
    high_risk_rate = mean(prob_tier %in% high_tiers),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(mean_prob))
ward_summary |> head(15)
```

```{r ward-plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
top20 <- ward_summary |> slice_max(mean_prob, n = 20)
ward_p <- ggplot(top20, aes(mean_prob, fct_reorder(factor(geographic_ward), mean_prob))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#d73027") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", mean_prob)), hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Top 20 wards by mean ensemble probability",
       x = "Mean P(vacant)", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(file.path(GRAPH_PATH, "ward_mean_prob.png"), ward_p,
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 200)
ward_p
```

## 6. Equity audit — AUC by census-tract median household income

```{r acs-load}
acs_path <- file.path(DATA_PATH, "acs_income_phl.csv")
acs_income <- NULL

if (file.exists(acs_path)) {
  acs_income <- read_csv(acs_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  if (!"census_tract_key" %in% names(acs_income)) {
    geoid_col <- intersect(c("GEOID", "geoid"), names(acs_income))[1]
    if (!is.na(geoid_col)) {
      acs_income$census_tract_key <- str_sub(as.character(acs_income[[geoid_col]]), -6)
    }
  }
  acs_income$census_tract_key <- str_pad(as.character(acs_income$census_tract_key),
                                         width = 6, side = "left", pad = "0")
  cat("ACS income loaded:", nrow(acs_income), "tracts\n")
} else if (requireNamespace("tidycensus", quietly = TRUE) &&
           Sys.getenv("CENSUS_API_KEY") != "") {
  acs_income <- tidycensus::get_acs(
    geography = "tract", state = "PA", county = "Philadelphia",
    variables = "B19013_001", year = 2022
  ) |>
    transmute(census_tract_key = str_sub(GEOID, -6),
              median_income = estimate)
  write_csv(acs_income, acs_path)
} else {
  message("No CENSUS_API_KEY and no acs_income_phl.csv — equity audit will skip.")
}
```

```{r acs-merge}
make_tract_key <- function(t) {
  ifelse(is.na(t), NA_character_,
         str_pad(as.character(round(as.numeric(t) * 100)),
                 width = 6, side = "left", pad = "0"))
}

if (!is.null(acs_income)) {
  df_eq <- df |>
    mutate(census_tract_key = make_tract_key(census_tract)) |>
    left_join(acs_income |> select(census_tract_key, median_income),
              by = "census_tract_key")
  coverage <- mean(!is.na(df_eq$median_income))
  cat(sprintf("Coverage: %.1f%%\n", 100 * coverage))
} else {
  df_eq <- df |> mutate(median_income = NA_real_)
  coverage <- 0
}
```

```{r equity}
eq <- NULL
if (!is.null(acs_income) && coverage > 0.5) {
  df_eq <- df_eq |>
    mutate(income_quintile = cut(
      median_income,
      breaks = quantile(median_income, probs = seq(0, 1, 0.2), na.rm = TRUE),
      labels = c("Q1 (lowest)", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5 (highest)"),
      include.lowest = TRUE
    ))
  eq <- df_eq |>
    filter(!is.na(income_quintile)) |>
    group_by(income_quintile) |>
    summarise(n_parcels = n(),
              n_vacant  = sum(ovs == 1),
              obs_rate  = mean(ovs == 1),
              mean_pred = mean(.data[[prob_col]]),
              auc       = safe_auc(ovs, .data[[prob_col]]),
              .groups = "drop")
  print(eq)
} else {
  message("Equity audit skipped (insufficient ACS coverage)")
}
```

```{r equity-plot, eval=!is.null(eq), fig.width=9, fig.height=4}
eq_long <- eq |> select(income_quintile, obs_rate, mean_pred) |>
  pivot_longer(-income_quintile, names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")
eq_p <- ggplot(eq_long, aes(income_quintile, value, fill = metric)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(obs_rate = "#2166ac", mean_pred = "#d6604d"),
                    labels = c("Observed vacancy rate", "Mean predicted P(vacant)")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(title = "Observed vs predicted vacancy rate by income quintile",
       x = NULL, y = "Rate", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(file.path(GRAPH_PATH, "equity_income_quintile.png"),
       eq_p, width = 9, height = 4, dpi = 200)
eq_p
```

## 7. Export

```{r export}
export_cols <- c("parcel_number", "ovs", "data_split",
                 prob_col, "prob_tier",
                 "zip_code", "geographic_ward", "census_tract",
                 "category_code", "category_code_description")
df |> select(any_of(export_cols)) |>
  write_csv(file.path(OUT_PATH, "predictions_04b.csv"))

write_csv(ward_summary, file.path(OUT_PATH, "ward_summary_04b.csv"))
write_csv(zip_auc,     file.path(OUT_PATH, "zip_auc_04b.csv"))
if (!is.null(eq)) write_csv(eq, file.path(OUT_PATH, "equity_income_auc.csv"))
```
